title: CAWS Lite Scope Configuration
description: Scope configuration for CAWS lite mode — guardrails without YAML specs

allowedDirectories.description: Directories the agent is allowed to modify (e.g., src/, tests/)

files.description: Glob patterns for banned file names (e.g., *-enhanced.*, *-final.*)

directories.description: Glob patterns for banned directory names (e.g., *venv*, .venv)

docs.description: Glob patterns for banned doc file names (e.g., *-summary.md)

maxNewFilesPerCommit.description: Maximum number of new files allowed per commit (prevents file sprawl)

designatedVenvPath.description: The only allowed virtual environment path (e.g., .venv)
